canonical_requirements: Use memory-bank files to keep context bounded.
Open only the smallest relevant file set.
Use scripts/codex-verify.ps1 as the verifier entrypoint.
Read TODO QA Live automation instructions before testing UI, game, Unreal, runtime, or live workflows.
Run every automatable QA Live check; if QA Live cannot cover automatable behavior, add or update the repo-owned QA Live spec or adjacent qa-live-test-system capability before calling it manual.
Follow solo-owner direct-main by default: commit on main and push to origin/main unless .repo-kit/workflow_policy.local.json or hosted branch protection requires team/PR flow.

After completing TODO-scoped work, update TODO evidence, add follow-up gap/improvement TODOs, update docs and decisions, refresh memory, commit/push, recommend QA Live-first validation, and list user-only checks only when automation or QA Live cannot prove the behavior.
Preserve repo-local overrides and do not overwrite local agent instructions without review.

repo_workflow_policy.commit_push_default: commit on main and push to origin/main
repo_workflow_policy.override_rule: When the override exists or hosted branch protection requires PR flow, follow the override and state why the work was not pushed directly to main.

installer_policy.default: Install Codex, memory-bank, verifier, TODO, logging, exchange, lint, lifecycle, and standards assets.
installer_policy.cline: Install only when scripts/bootstrap/install_repo_standards.ps1 is run with -IncludeCline or -InstallHooksProfile.
installer_policy.preservation: Existing optional agent projection files are preserved in existing repos unless reviewed and forced by the repo owner.

profiles.local_override: Repo-specific details stay in nested AGENTS.override.md or task-pack files.
Repo-specific .clinerules files may extend but should not contradict AGENTS.md.
Create or update manually from docs/AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS_COMPATIBILITY.md after reviewing existing CLAUDE.md.
Create or update manually after reviewing existing Cursor rules.
Create or update manually after reviewing existing GitHub Copilot instructions.

qa_live_rule: If a TODO or task pack has QA Live automation instructions, follow them before any UI/game/Unreal/runtime/live verification. Use qa-live-test-system dry-run or capability-manifest mode before live execution. If a needed check is automatable but unsupported, add or update the repo-owned QA Live spec/contract or adjacent qa-live-test-system capability before treating the gap as manual.
post_todo_completion_rule: After any TODO completion, mark only verified TODOs complete, add new TODOs for discovered gaps or broad follow-up work, update affected docs and durable decisions, run the canonical verifier plus all automatable QA Live/artifact gates, update qa-live-test-system when required to cover automatable behavior and push that repo to main, refresh memory-bank, record reusable pitfalls or solution harvests, commit with a related message, push to main by default unless .repo-kit/workflow_policy.local.json or hosted branch protection requires team/PR flow, recommend QA Live-first validation for real functionality, and list user-only checks only when automation or QA Live cannot prove the behavior.

context_profiles.32k: Local AI; aggressively condense, summarize, and cut context.
context_profiles.64k: Local AI; still aggressively condense and prefer memory-bank over raw files.
context_profiles.cloud: Hosted AI; allow richer context for speed/confirmation but keep cost bounded.
